name: Learning Share
prompt:
Something I learned recently about {topic}: {insight}.

I used to think {old_belief}, but now I see {new_belief}.

What's a belief you've reconsidered lately?

#Learning #Growth

name: Tool Recommendation
prompt:
I've been using {tool_name} for {use_case} and honestly it's been a game-changer.

The biggest benefit: {benefit}.

If you work in {field}, I'd recommend giving it a try.

What tools are you loving right now?

#TechTools #Productivity #CareerTips

name: Project Update
Career Reflection
Hot Take / Discussion
prompt:
Unpopular opinion in {industry}:

{opinion}

I'll take the counterpoint — {reasoning}.

Change my mind. 😄

#HotTake #Discussion #Industry

name: Gratitude / Shoutout
prompt:
Shoutout to {person_or_team} for {reason}.

It made a real difference. Grateful to work alongside people who bring this kind of energy.

If someone helped you this week, drop a comment and tag them. Recognition matters.

#Gratitude #Teamwork #Culture
